name: marchyo.ai.context.enable
description: OpenViking (`ov`) local context layer for AI clients.

name: marchyo.ai.enable
description: BYOK AI tooling and desktop integration. Installs per-user AI clients wired to OpenRouter, task-based model routing, a local context layer, MCP tools and Agent Skills.

name: marchyo.ai.mcp.enable
description: Wire MCP tools (mcp-nixos via uvx) into the AI clients.

name: marchyo.ai.openrouter.apiKeyFile
description: Runtime path to the OpenRouter API key (required when marchyo.ai is enabled). The key is read at runtime and never enters the Nix store.

name: marchyo.ai.openrouter.baseUrl
description: OpenAI-compatible base URL used by the AI clients.

name: marchyo.ai.openrouter.defaultModel
description: Model used when task-based routing is disabled.

name: marchyo.ai.routing.enable
description: Task→model routing (routing.tasks.<bucket>, routing.tools). The resolved policy is exported to ~/.config/marchyo/ai-routing.json.

name: marchyo.ai.skills.enable
description: Install Agent Skills to all AI clients.

name: marchyo.ai.tooling.enable
description: Install the AI CLIs (aichat / pi / claude-code).

name: marchyo.autoTimezone.enable
description: Automatic timezone updates from your location (services.automatic-timezoned via geoclue2). Overrides the static marchyo.timezone when enabled.

name: marchyo.cli.enable
description: Install the `marchyo` user CLI system-wide. Lets end users inspect their configuration, toggle settings, and wrap nixos-rebuild.

name: marchyo.defaultLocale
description: System default locale.

name: marchyo.defaults.audioPlayer
description: Default audio player for local files. Registered as the system default for audio MIME types (except cmus, a TUI with no single-file handler). Set to null to skip.

name: marchyo.defaults.browser
description: Default web browser. Installed automatically when desktop is enabled and registered as the system default for HTTP/HTTPS links. Set to null to skip.

name: marchyo.defaults.editor
description: Default graphical text editor ($VISUAL). "jotain" (Jylhis's Emacs config) is the default. Set to null to skip editor management.

name: marchyo.defaults.email
description: Default email client. "aerc"/"neomutt" are TUI clients; "gmail"/"outlook" are externally-managed web apps.

name: marchyo.defaults.fileManager
description: Default graphical file manager.

name: marchyo.defaults.imageEditor
description: Default image editor.

name: marchyo.defaults.musicPlayer
description: Default music client bound to the Hyprland Super+M keybind. Defaults to spotify-player, a TUI client launched in a floating terminal.

name: marchyo.defaults.terminalEditor
description: Default terminal text editor ($EDITOR). "jotain" (Jylhis's Emacs config) is the default. Set to null to skip.

name: marchyo.defaults.terminalFileManager
description: Default terminal file manager.

name: marchyo.defaults.videoPlayer
description: Default video player, registered as the system default for video MIME types.

name: marchyo.desktop.enable
description: Enable desktop environment (Hyprland, Wayland, fonts, etc.). Cascades media and office on via lib.mkDefault.

name: marchyo.development.enable
description: Enable development tools (Docker, buildah, gh, etc.).

name: marchyo.dictation.enable
description: Push-to-talk voice dictation on the Wayland desktop via voxtype + Whisper. Off by default (needs a microphone and downloads a Whisper model).

name: marchyo.dictation.gpu
description: Use the Vulkan GPU build (pkgs.voxtype-vulkan); set false for the CPU-only pkgs.voxtype.

name: marchyo.dictation.language
description: Spoken language ("auto" detects per utterance; e.g. "en" to pin).

name: marchyo.dictation.model
description: Whisper model voxtype loads.

name: marchyo.dictation.pushToTalk.enable
description: Daemon evdev hold hotkey; adds dictation users to the `input` group. Set false to rely only on the compositor toggle.

name: marchyo.dictation.pushToTalk.key
description: evdev key held to record (e.g. "SCROLLLOCK", "PAUSE", "F13").

name: marchyo.emacs.enable
description: Marchyo Emacs daemon and Hyprland integration.

name: marchyo.graphics.nvidia.open
description: Use NVIDIA's open-source kernel modules. Recommended for Turing (RTX 20xx) and newer; required for RTX 50xx. Set false for older GPUs.

name: marchyo.graphics.prime.enable
description: Enable NVIDIA PRIME for hybrid graphics laptops. Requires both an integrated GPU and nvidia in vendors.

name: marchyo.graphics.prime.mode
description: PRIME render mode: offload (on-demand, power efficient), sync (always dGPU), reverse-sync (iGPU display, dGPU compute).

name: marchyo.graphics.vendors
description: GPU vendors present in the system. For hybrid laptops specify both (e.g. ["intel" "nvidia"]). Find your GPU with: lspci | grep -E 'VGA|3D'.

name: marchyo.hardware.logitech.enable
description: Enable Logitech wireless device support (Solaar GUI + udev rules).

name: marchyo.keyboard.autoActivateIME
description: Automatically activate the input method for layouts that declare an IME.

name: marchyo.keyboard.composeKey
description: Compose key for typing accented/special characters (e.g. em dash).

name: marchyo.keyboard.imeTriggerKey
description: Hyprland bind(s) that toggle the input method.

name: marchyo.keyboard.layouts
description: List of keyboard layouts and input methods. Each entry is a layout string or an attrset { layout; variant?; ime?; label?; }.

name: marchyo.keyboard.options
description: XKB keyboard options for fcitx5 keyboard layouts.

name: marchyo.media.enable
description: Enable media applications (Spotify, MPV, etc.). Auto-enabled with desktop via lib.mkDefault.

name: marchyo.menus.enable
description: Power/session and central system menus (auto-enabled with desktop).

name: marchyo.office.enable
description: Enable office applications (LibreOffice, Papers, etc.). Auto-enabled with desktop via lib.mkDefault.

name: marchyo.osd.enable
description: On-screen display for volume/brightness via SwayOSD (auto-enabled with desktop).

name: marchyo.performance.disableMitigations
description: Disable CPU vulnerability mitigations (Spectre, Meltdown, etc.) for maximum performance. Reduces security — only for trusted single-user workstations.

name: marchyo.performance.kernel
description: Kernel variant to boot. Applied with lib.mkDefault so a host can still set boot.kernelPackages directly.

name: marchyo.performance.tuning.compute.enable
description: Relax resource limits for trusted single-user compute/CUDA hosts (PAM memlock/rtprio, sched_rt_runtime_us=-1). Security/stability sensitive — off by default.

name: marchyo.performance.tuning.enable
description: Enable kernel/sysctl/IO performance tuning. Turns on the broadly-safe sub-toggles (network, nvme, memory); the aggressive ones (hugePages, compute) stay off.

name: marchyo.performance.tuning.hugePages.enable
description: Enable 2 MiB transparent huge pages always. Improves TLB performance for large allocations but can hurt interactive/desktop latency.

name: marchyo.power.hibernation.enable
description: Hibernation (suspend-to-disk) support. Requires resumeDevice.

name: marchyo.power.hibernation.resumeDevice
description: Swap device the kernel resumes from. Required for hibernate; needs swap >= RAM to hold the hibernation image.

name: marchyo.power.hibernation.suspendThenHibernate
description: Use suspend-then-hibernate for lid close and idle (suspend first, hibernate after a delay).

name: marchyo.reminders.enable
description: Gum-driven desktop reminders (marchyo-reminder-set/-show/-clear via Super+Ctrl+R chords). Part of the desktop cascade.

name: marchyo.screensaver.enable
description: tte-based (terminaltexteffects) terminal screensaver launched on idle. Auto-enabled with marchyo.desktop.enable.

name: marchyo.security.fido2.enable
description: FIDO2/U2F hardware security key authentication via pam_u2f.

name: marchyo.security.fingerprint.enable
description: Fingerprint authentication via fprintd (PAM integration is automatic). hyprlock follows this setting.

name: marchyo.security.firewall.enable
description: Whether the firewall is on by default. networking.firewall.enable follows this value via mkDefault, so false is a real off-switch.

name: marchyo.services.localsend.enable
description: Enable LocalSend file sharing (auto-enabled with the desktop). Opens TCP/UDP port 53317 on the LAN.

name: marchyo.services.tailscale.enable
description: Enable the Tailscale mesh VPN daemon and open the firewall for its traffic.

name: marchyo.snapshots.btrfs
description: Whether the root filesystem is btrfs. Set false on ext4/zfs hosts to skip all btrfs-specific config.

name: marchyo.snapshots.enable
description: Automatic filesystem snapshots via snapper (timeline + cleanup). Assumes a btrfs root by default.

name: marchyo.snapshots.subvolume
description: Subvolume snapper takes timeline snapshots of.

name: marchyo.theme.enable
description: Enable Stylix theming system.

name: marchyo.theme.scheme
description: Override the base16 color scheme (a base16-schemes YAML name, e.g. "nord"). When null, the Jylhis palette derived from variant is used.

name: marchyo.theme.variant
description: Theme variant preference. "dark" uses Jylhis Roast, "light" uses Jylhis Paper. Override with marchyo.theme.scheme for a base16-schemes YAML instead.

name: marchyo.theme.wallpaper.enable
description: Enable the generated Marchyo grid wallpaper where supported.

name: marchyo.timezone
description: System timezone.

name: marchyo.tracking.enable
description: Enable the full local-first self-tracking stack. Sub-collectors default on via lib.mkDefault; screenshot capture defaults off and must be enabled explicitly.

name: marchyo.users.<name>.email
description: Your email address. Wired into git config and user-facing applications.

name: marchyo.users.<name>.enable
description: If set to false, the user account will not have any Marchyo stuff.

name: marchyo.users.<name>.fullname
description: Your full name, used for the account, git identity and application metadata.

name: marchyo.users.<name>.uid
description: Numeric user id. On NixOS sets users.users.<name>.uid; on nix-darwin opts the user into users.knownUsers for declarative login-shell management.

name: marchyo.utilities.enable
description: Quick-info and media utilities: date/time and battery notifications, marchyo-transcode, and the marchyo-share clipboard helper. Part of the desktop cascade.

name: marchyo.webapps.browser
description: Chromium-family browser used to launch web apps in --app mode. null follows marchyo.defaults.browser when chromium-based, otherwise falls back to chromium.

name: marchyo.webapps.enable
description: Register web apps as standalone browser app windows (.desktop entries + Hyprland launch binds). Auto-enabled with marchyo.desktop.enable via lib.mkDefault.
